meaning: n.(印度男人的)腹带,徽带,装饰带
examples: Waist cummerbund, shirt and boutonnieres for groom.
The groom's dressing would not change much: only colored by a stamped red piece of cloth worn on the waist as if it was cummerbund.
Cables are routed through an interchangeable cummerbund that integrates body armor and is secured to the standard or custom plate-carriers.
Cultural awareness is reflected sartorially: young men happily sport the goats' wool chukhoranek, and cummerbund.
Mr. Lobban suggested wearing the cummerbund with the crew-neck tee as a contemporary evening look.
